The DNA sequence ATGGCCAAATTAA translates to the peptide sequence MAKL [tool:sequence_basic_analysis].

### Sequence Details
The provided DNA sequence has a length of 13 nucleotides [tool:sequence_basic_analysis]. The composition of the sequence consists of 6 Adenine (A), 3 Thymine (T), 2 Guanine (G), and 2 Cytosine (C) bases, resulting in a GC content of 30.77% [tool:sequence_basic_analysis]. The resulting protein translation has a length of 4 amino acids [tool:sequence_basic_analysis].
